title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Exide Industries - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Exide Industries - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Exide Industries in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Exide Industries:
Exide Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries!
